scripts.dev: npm run build -w @better-typescript/core && npm run build -w @better-typescript/checks && tsx packages/cli/src/index.ts --pretty
scripts.start: npm run build -w @better-typescript/core && npm run build -w @better-typescript/checks && tsx packages/cli/src/index.ts
scripts.watch: npm run build -w @better-typescript/core && npm run build -w @better-typescript/checks && tsx packages/cli/src/index.ts --pretty --watch
scripts.build: npm run build -w @better-typescript/core && npm run build -w @better-typescript/checks && npm run build -w @better-typescript/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run build && tsc --noEmit -p tests/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p bench/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p bench/fixtures/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p examples/extend-preset/tsconfig.json
scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx --test tests/**/*.test.ts
